title: Cherry On Top
description: Pop your cherry with this firm and fruity soap, inspired by mouthwatering fruit sandwich recipes from Japan.
ingredients: Cocos Nucifera Oil (Organic Extra Virgin Coconut Oil)
Prunus Amygdalus Amara Kernel Oil (Almond Essential Oil)
Styrax Tonkinensis Resin Extract (Benzoin Resinoid Extract)
Citrus Aurantium Amara Flower Extract (Orange Flower Extract)

images.alt: Cherry On Top. An off-square slice of cream-coloured soap which features a cross-section design of a large dark pink cherry with a large green leaf.

A square Cherry On Top soap bar with a dark cherry and green leaf design sits in a small dish on a pink table. A person with pink-tipped nails reaches for the soap near a white bathtub and a vase of pink flowers.

A person with pink-tipped nails holds the cream-coloured Cherry On Top soap bar over a white bathtub. The soap features a large dark pink cherry and green leaf design, its surface wet from the bathwater.

A person with pink-tipped nails uses the cream-coloured Cherry On Top soap bar to lather their skin in a white bathtub. The soap, featuring a dark pink cherry and green leaf design, creates white foam on their wet skin.

A person with pink-tipped nails washes their arms in a white bathtub. White soap suds from the Cherry On Top soap cover their wet skin under a stream of water. In the background, a red curtain, yellow robe, and red strawberry jar are visible.

A close-up image showing white soap suds and bubbles dripping down a person's wet skin after using a Lush Cherry On Top soap bar. The foamy lather creates organic patterns against the skin in a brightly lit bathroom setting.
